data.title: The suspected Mantra DAO project owner destroyed 18.417 million OMs, worth about $119 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, the suspected Mantra DAO project address (0xb4…A4e5) transferred 18.417 million OM to the destruction address at 18:59 (UTC+8) today, which is worth about 119 million US dollars at the current price. As of now, the cumulative destruction of OM has reached 103.6 million pieces, accounting for 11.66% of the total supply, and the cumulative destruction value is about 668 million US dollars.

data.title: JPMorgan Highlights Economic Turbulence Amid Geopolitical Tensions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan has noted significant economic turbulence, citing geopolitical and trade-related tensions as key factors. These tensions have led to increased market volatility, prompting clients to exercise greater caution. The bank maintains that in such an environment, it is prudent to ensure sufficient capital and liquidity.

data.title: Swedish MP proposes Bitcoin reserve to finance minister
data.description:
A member of Sweden’s parliament has proposed adding Bitcoin to the country's national foreign exchange reserves, suggesting increased openness to cryptocurrency adoption in Europe following recent moves by the United States. Swedish MP Rickard Nordin has issued an open letter urging Finance Minister Elisabeth Svantesson to consider adopting Bitcoin (BTC) as a national reserve asset. “Sweden has a tradition of a conservative and carefully managed foreign exchange reserve, mainly consisting of foreign currencies and gold,” Nordin wrote in a letter registered on April 8, adding:“At the same time, there is a rapid development in digital assets, and several international players regard bitcoin as a custodian and a hedge against inflation. In many parts of the world, bitcoin is used as a means of payment and as security against rising inflation
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/swedish-mp-bitcoin-reserve-finance-minister?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Freedogs (FREEDOG) listed on Gate.io Launchpool
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will start FREEDOG staking mining from 20:00 on April 11 to 20:00 on April 22 (UTC+8). Staking FREEDOG, GT, and USDT to participate in Launchpool will allow you to share 40,000,000 FREEDOG airdrops for free. Among them, the FREEDOG mining pool is expected to achieve an annualized return of 2607.14%, the GT mining pool is expected to achieve an annualized return of 20.71% in the first phase and 11.83% in the second phase, and the USDT mining pool is expected to achieve an annualized return of 45.63%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: CoinW launches PROMPT spot and launches bounty campaign
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinW has officially launched the PROMPT/USDT trading pair at 7:00 (UTC) on April 11, and simultaneously launched the "PROMPT Bounty Program", with a prize pool of up to 5,000 USDT! 
PROMPT is the native token of Wayfinder, a cross-chain AI tool developed by Parallel Studios. The project uses simple instructions to allow AI agents to perform complex tasks such as asset transfers and deployment of smart contracts across multiple chains. Currently, Wayfinder has received US$35 million in financing, with investors including VanEck, Solana Ventures, Distributed Global, and Solana founders Anatoly Yakovenko and Raj Gokal. The total supply of PROMPT tokens is 1 billion, which is widely used to purchase AI assistants, pay gas fees, privacy protection, governance and staking incentives, etc.

data.title: What is a bear raid, and how do whales use them in crypto trading?
data.description:
Key takeawaysBear raids involve deliberate efforts by whales to drive down crypto prices using short-selling, FUD and large-scale sell-offs to trigger panic and profit from the dip. These raids create volatility, trigger liquidations and damage retail confidence. However, they can also expose weak or fraudulent projects. Signs include sudden price drops, high trading volume, absence of news and quick recoveries, indicating price manipulation rather than natural market trends
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/what-is-a-bear-raid-and-how-do-whales-use-them-in-crypto-trading?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
